Declaration Of Stacey D. Ackerson In Support Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Nov-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a request for Default Judgment against Defendant Edinburgh Castle, A California General Partnership, Defendant Hae S. Moody and Defendant Tay Young Kim.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:40:17 a.m., pausing at 10:31:50 a.m., resuming at 10:38:08 and concluding at 10:42:24 a.m. (D505)

Donald Brigham, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff U.S. Bank National Association via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Edinburgh Castle, A California General Partnership, Defendant Hae S. Moody and Defendant Tay Young Kim not appearing.
Stacey Ackerson, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Complaint for Foreclosure and Trust Deed filed Feb-08-2024.
Proof of service filed as to Defendant Edinburgh Castle, A California General Partnership, Defendant Hae S. Moody and Defendant Tay Young Kim on Mar-15-2024.
Default entered on Apr-05-2024 as to Defendant Edinburgh Castle, A California General Partnership, Defendant Hae S. Moody and Defendant Tay Young Kim.

Matter was continued for Plaintiff to provide additional evidence for the Court's review in support of the reques to for the default judgment.
Counsel provides an offer of proof as to the attorney's fees.

Costs and amounts requested for judgment are discussed.

The Court examines the witness. Witness confirms statments and declarations made are tru and correct.

Counsel confirms that the judgment granted shall resolve the entire action and shall allow for the sale of the said property.

Good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS Plaintiff's request for default judgment against defendants.

Plaintiff's Counsel to submit proposed judgment as amended by the Court for approval and signature.
